/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui_glfw.a "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_glfw.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui_glfw.a
